documentControl.purpose: Describe the architecture of Stellar Platform, the Internal Developer Platform (IDP) replacing fragmented tooling and manual processes for 400 engineers across 60 product teams at Stellar Engineering Ltd.
documentControl.scope: Self-service IDP portal, golden paths, multi-cloud Kubernetes control plane, developer-facing tooling. Covers the platform itself and the migration of existing Jenkins-based CI to the new platform.

executiveSummary.solutionOverview: Stellar Platform is an Internal Developer Platform providing golden paths for service creation, deployment, and observability to 400 engineers across 60 product teams. The portal is Backstage-based; infrastructure provisioning is via Crossplane and Terraform; GitOps deployment is via ArgoCD; observability is federated across Datadog (paid tier) and self-hosted Prometheus+Grafana. The platform is multi-cloud: primary on GKE (europe-west2), secondary on EKS (eu-west-2) with active-passive DR. Target is a 40% reduction in lead time (DORA metric) within 12 months of go-live. Platform-as-a-product team operates on Team Topologies lines with a clear Stream-Aligned customer relationship with product teams.

_note: This is a summary JSON stub. See the full Recommended-depth example at https://archstandard.org/v1/examples/stellar-platform/ or the Markdown version at /v1/examples/stellar-platform.md
